acepta_comunicaciones: I wish to receive commercial communications and news from SportTracker.
acepta_rgpd_1: I have read and accept the
avatar_formato_invalido: The file must be an image (JPG, PNG, WebP…).
avatar_max_size: Max. 100 KB · automatically compressed if larger
avatar_eliminar_confirmar_texto: Confirm you want to delete the avatar for this season. This action is irreversible.
avatar_temporada: You can include a new avatar each season
callback_text2: Your browser might be blocking local storage or you opened the callback in another tab. If it stays here, go back and repeat the login from the same tab.
claim: Your sports history, season by season
competicion_eliminar_confirmar_texto: Confirm you want to delete this competition. All data will be lost. This action is irreversible.
competicion_nombre_info: For example: pre-season, tournaments, league, playoffs...
consulta_texto: Tell us briefly about your query…
contacta_nuevo_deporte: contact us if you would like another sport added.
contacto_acepta_condiciones: I accept the use of my data to manage this contact request.
contacto_text2: Fill out the form and we will reply shortly.
contacto_text3: Thank you! We have received your message and will reply as soon as possible.
cookies_aceptacion_texto: We use cookies for essential purposes, analytics, features and marketing. You can reject all except necessary ones, or configure them.
cookies_analitica_texto: Usage measurement. Requires consent unless exempt AEPD mode.
cookies_necesarias_texto: Required for basic operation. Always active.
cuenta_cancelar_texto: Are you sure you want to cancel your account? This action cannot be undone.
cuenta_cancelar_texto_modal: If you cancel your account, you will lose access to all data and features of the application. This action is irreversible.
cuenta_sin_recibos: There are no receipts for this account.
dashboard_suscribete_texto: To start registering athletes you must subscribe to one of our plans.
facturas_recientes_detalle: Latest payments processed on your account.
facturas_vacias_detalle: Once you complete a payment, the invoice will appear here.
deportista_no_encontrado_mensaje: There is no information in the system about this athlete.
equipo_necesita_club_aviso: To create a team, you must first create a club.
equipo_nombre_info: For example: Junior A, Cadet B, Orange Youth,...
error_asientos_indisponibles: You do not have any more athlete registrations available. Renew your subscription.
hora_opcional: Time (optional — defaults to midnight if not set)
galeria_aviso: Remember that images and videos are stored on the device you used to capture or link them. In the gallery you will only see media stored on the device you are using.
galeria_vacia: There are no images or videos for this match.
home_deportes_texto: Record the sports history of these sports
home_feature1_text: Register and track the sports history of your favourite players.
home_feature2_text: Basketball, football, futsal, handball, volleyball, rugby, water polo, roller hockey and field hockey
home_feature3_text: Analyse performance each match and season. Full history of wins, losses, points scored, goals,...
home_feature4_text: Capture and store the best moments of every match to remember them forever.
home_feature5_text: Record data even without internet and sync automatically when you are back online.
home_feature6_text: You do not need to download an app from any store. Use it from your browser.
home_main_text1: Looking for an app to save match stats for you or your kids? With Deporteen you can keep goals, points, assists, minutes played,... match by match, and add photos and videos. A memory for life.
imagenes_guarda_local: Images are saved locally on your device. They are not uploaded to any server.
jugador_eliminar_confirmar_texto: Confirm you want to delete this player. All data for this player will be removed. This action is irreversible.
media_eliminar_confirmar_texto: Confirm you want to delete this file
no_cierres_app: Do not close the app or lock the screen.
pago_completado: Payment completed successfully and your subscription has been activated.
player_nuevo_texto2: Next, indicate all the participations the athlete has in one or more sports and categories.
recibos_ver_question: Do you need all your receipts?
recuperacion_enviada: We have sent a password recovery email. If it is not in your inbox, check spam.
renovacion_proxima_texto: Your subscription will renew soon; you can renew from here.
sesion_iniciar_aviso: You must log in to subscribe.
sin_competiciones_actuales: There is no competition registered at the moment.
sin_preview: File not found. It may be saved on another of your devices.
stripe_products_description: Manage your Stripe catalog from a single place.
stripe_product_modal_subtitle: Set a name, description, and optionally an initial price.
stripe_product_description_placeholder: Describe the product for your customers.
stripe_product_create_price_help: When enabled, a default price will be generated automatically in Stripe.
stripe_product_price_hint: Enter the amount in the selected currency; we will convert it to the correct unit amount.
stripe_prices_description: Define the amounts and currencies of your plans in Stripe.
stripe_price_modal_subtitle: Configure the amount, currency, and charge type.
stripe_price_amount_hint: It will be converted to the correct unit amount automatically.
stripe_price_type_hint: After creation you can only activate or deactivate the price.
partido_eliminar_texto_modal: If you delete this match, all its data and associated files will be removed. This action is irreversible.
stripe_price_manage_subtitle: You can enable or disable the price and adjust its internal name. To change the amount create a new price.
stripe_price_manage_status_hint: Use this switch to enable or disable the price for new purchases.
stripe_price_confirm_archive_description: When you archive a price it remains available for existing subscriptions but can't be used for new purchases.
stripe_price_replace_description: Enter the details of the new price. The previous price will be archived automatically afterwards.
stripe_price_replace_error: We couldn't create the new price.
stripe_payments_description: Review the status of one-off charges processed through Stripe.
stripe_payments_empty: There are no one-time payments yet.
stripe_subscriptions_description: Track subscription status and renewal periods.
stripe_coupons_description: Manage the discount codes available in Stripe.
stripe_coupons_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this coupon? This action cannot be undone.
stripe_invoices_description: Monitor invoice statuses, due dates, and outstanding balances.
stripe_invoices_filters_search_placehold: Search by customer, number, or ID
stripe_coupons_create_dialog_description: Create a new coupon for your customers
stripe_coupons_create_success_descriptio: The coupon has been created successfully.
stripe_coupons_create_description: Create a new coupon for your customers
stripe_coupons_edit_metadata_hint: Provide a JSON object with key-value pairs.
suscripcion_inactiva_titulo: You do not have an active subscription at the moment.
suscripcion_inactiva_texto: You must renew your subscription to add new matches, and extend it to add new athletes.
suscripcion_planes_texto:
All subscription plans include:
· Unlimited access to all recorded history.
· Export history to .xls.
· Images and videos are stored on your own device.
· 14-day period to request a refund.
suscripcion_renovar_texto: Choose one of our plans to renew your subscription.
suscripcion_texto1: Register an athlete if you have a valid free access code. If you want to register more than one athlete, you must indicate it in the form.
suscripcion_texto2: You can register 1 athlete with an access code. If you need to add more athletes, you must complete the payment via Stripe. You can always create one now with a code and add more later via Stripe.
suscripciones_no_registradas: You have no subscriptions at the moment.

sections.title: 1. Owner identification
sections.html:
This website and the {{product.app_name}} app ({{product.domain}}) are owned by {{company.name}}, tax ID {{company.nif}}, registered at {{company.address}}, {{company.country}}. Contact email: {{company.email}}.

Commercial register: {{company.reg_merc}}

sections.title: 2. Purpose and acceptance
sections.html: This Legal Notice governs access to and use of {{product.app_name}}. Access implies acceptance of these terms and, where applicable, the Terms of Use.

sections.title: 3. Users and minors
sections.html: The platform is intended for adults. Children under 16 may not create an account. Adults may record sports information about third parties, including minors, in accordance with the Content & Image Policy.

sections.title: 4. Intellectual property
sections.html: The software, design and interface of {{product.app_name}} belong to {{company.name}} or its licensors. Use does not grant any intellectual property rights.

sections.title: 5. Liability
sections.html: {{company.name}} is not liable for data, images or videos the user stores on the device, nor for damage arising from misuse of the application.

sections.title: 6. Third-party links and services
sections.html: The app integrates third-party services (e.g. Supabase in {{providers.supabase_region}} for the database, Stripe in {{providers.stripe_region}} for payments, {{providers.hosting}} for hosting and {{providers.analytics}} for analytics). See the Privacy Policy.

sections.title: 7. Applicable law and jurisdiction
sections.html: The law of {{legal.jurisdiction}} applies and, unless mandatory rules provide otherwise, the courts of the consumer user’s domicile.

sections.title: 1. Data controller
sections.html: Controller: {{company.name}} ({{company.email}}). A Data Protection Officer has not been appointed for the time being.

sections.title: 2. Data we process
sections.html:
• Account: name, surname, email and phone (optional).
  • Service use: sports statistics created by the user about third parties.
  • Media: images and videos stored locally on the device, not in the cloud.
  • Payments: transaction identification managed by Stripe.
  • Analytics: measurements with {{providers.analytics}}.

sections.title: 3. Purposes and legal bases
sections.html:
• Service and subscription (performance of contract).
  • Usage analytics (consent; see Cookie Policy).
  • Renewal notifications (consent).
  • Security and fraud prevention (legitimate interest).

sections.title: 4. Origin and accuracy
sections.html: Data comes from the user. If you record information about third parties, you warrant sufficient legitimacy (e.g. consent of image rights holders for minors).

sections.title: 5. Retention
sections.html:
• Account and records: while the account exists. Billing data: 6 years.
  • Security logs: 12 months unless incidents require longer.
  • Analytics and consents: until withdrawn.

sections.title: 6. Recipients and processors
sections.html:
• Supabase (EU/Ireland) as database provider.
  • Stripe for payments.
  • {{providers.hosting}} for hosting.
  • {{providers.analytics}} (configured according to consent).

No international transfers outside the EEA beyond those inherent to these providers and covered by their compliance mechanisms.

sections.title: 7. Rights
sections.html: You may exercise access, rectification, erasure, objection, restriction and portability by writing to {{legal.data_subject_email}}. Response time: 1 month.

sections.title: 8. Security measures
sections.html: Encryption in transit (TLS) and at rest in database services, access controls, provider backups and data minimisation. Media (photos/videos) are stored in local device storage controlled by the user.

sections.title: 9. Minors
sections.html: Children under 16 cannot create an account. Adults who register data or images of minors declare sufficient legitimacy and must comply with the Content & Image Policy.

sections.title: 1. What are cookies?
sections.html: We use cookies and similar technologies so the site works and, if you accept, to measure usage with {{providers.analytics}}.

sections.title: 2. Settings
sections.html:
You can customise preferences in the Cookie preferences banner. Categories used:

  • Necessary: essential for operation (login, security).
  • Analytics: usage measurement with {{providers.analytics}} (requires consent unless AEPD exempt mode).
  • Functional: non-essential improvements.
  • Marketing: not used currently.

sections.title: 3. Cookies we use
sections.html:
Necessary

  • Supabase session: {{cookies.session}}.
  • Stripe (checkout): {{cookies.stripe}}.

Analytics

  • Google Analytics 4: {{cookies.ga4}}.

We may also use local storage (IndexedDB/localStorage) for content and preferences.

sections.title: 4. How to change or withdraw consent
sections.html: You can reopen the preferences panel from the “Cookies” link in the footer, or clear cookies in your browser settings.

sections.title: 1. Purpose
sections.html: These Terms govern use of {{product.app_name}}.

sections.title: 2. Account and access
sections.html: The account is personal and for users over 16. An adult may register third-party athletes.

sections.title: 3. Plans and payments
sections.html: Payments are processed with Stripe. Invoices are issued by Stripe.

sections.title: 4. Withdrawal and refunds
sections.html: You have 14 days from purchase to request a refund if you have not consumed services that legally prevent it.

sections.title: 5. User content
sections.html: You are responsible for data and images you store. You must comply with applicable law and our Content Policy.

sections.title: 6. Limitation of liability
sections.html: The service is provided “as is” with reasonable diligence.

sections.title: 1. Purchase process
sections.html: Subscriptions are managed through Stripe. Once payment is confirmed, access is activated.

sections.title: 2. Renewals and notices
sections.html: We may send renewal notices if you consent.

sections.title: 3. Billing
sections.html: The invoice is the one generated by Stripe and will be available on your payment receipt.

sections.title: 4. Withdrawal
sections.html: 14-day right of withdrawal under consumer law, subject to applicable legal exceptions.

sections.title: 1. Scope
sections.html: Governs use of images and videos and recording data about third parties, including minors.

sections.title: 2. Image rights
sections.html: If you store images or videos of third parties, you must have their consent. For minors, consent must be given by their legal guardian.

sections.title: 3. Prohibitions
sections.html: Uploading or keeping unlawful, defamatory content or content that infringes third-party rights is prohibited.

sections.title: 4. Content removal
sections.html: We may require removal of content that breaches this policy or the law. You can contact {{legal.data_subject_email}}.
